body.title: Quick Start Guide
body.subtitle: Get editing Google Docs with AI in under 5 minutes
body.p: ExtraSuite is published to PyPI. You can run it directly without installing using uvx, or install it permanently:
body.li: Development: clone the repo and run ./extrasuite --help from the client/ directory
body.h1: Step 1 — Create or Open a Document
body.li: Run: extrasuite doc create "My Document Title"
A browser window opens for Google authentication
After login, the document URL is printed to your terminal
body.p: To open an existing document, you need its URL from the browser address bar.
Pull downloads the document and converts it into local files:
body.li: Run: extrasuite doc pull <URL>
A folder is created in your current directory named after the document ID
Inside you will find index.xml and one subfolder per tab
Each tab folder contains document.xml — the file you edit

td.p: Lists all tabs; add new <tab> entries here to create tabs
Content for Tab 1 — this is the main file you edit
Named style overrides for this tab — rarely edited
All comments and replies across the document
Original state snapshot — do not edit
Raw API responses for debugging — do not edit

body.p: Open Tab_1/document.xml in any text editor or have your AI agent modify it. The format is semantic HTML-like XML:
body.li: Add <h1>, <h2> etc. for headings

Use

for regular paragraphs
Use <li> with type and level attributes for lists
Use <table>, <tr>, <td> for tables
Wrap text in <b> or <i> for inline formatting

No newlines inside content elements like

,

,

Every must have at least one

, even if empty
Escape special characters: & < > "

After a list, add

before a heading to break out of list context
Elements marked read-only (<hr/>, <image/>, <autotext/>) cannot be added or removed
body.p: Before pushing, preview your changes. Diff is offline — no API calls are made:
body.li: Run: extrasuite doc diff <folder>
The output shows the batchUpdate requests that will be sent to Google
Review for unexpected changes before proceeding
body.p: When the diff looks correct, apply the changes to the live Google Doc:
body.li: Run: extrasuite doc push <folder>
ExtraSuite computes the diff and sends the batchUpdate to Google
Open the document in your browser to verify the result
Always re-pull before making further edits — the revision ID changes after every push
body.p: ExtraSuite has built-in help at every level:
body.li: extrasuite --help — top-level commands
extrasuite doc --help — all doc subcommands with format reference
extrasuite doc help — list available reference topics
extrasuite doc help style-reference — style properties and inheritance
extrasuite doc help troubleshooting — common errors and fixes
